result.content: Customer service best practices. Be polite. Listen to the customer. Resolve issues quickly.
result.script: Hello. Today I'll cover the key points from this content. Customer service best practices. Be polite. Listen to the customer. Resolve issues quickly. Those are the main points. Thank you for listening.
feedback: Speak clearly and at a steady pace.
Use pauses after key points to let ideas sink in.
Structure your content with a clear opening, main points, and closing.
Maintain eye contact with your audience.
Practice your delivery to build confidence.
